stemHtml: The electromagnetic spectrum is divided into several bands, some of which are used for aeronautical mobile communications. Which of the following is true?

options.a: The HF band is used for aeronautical mobile communications and contains higher frequencies than the VHF band.
options.b: The UHF band is used for aeronautical mobile communications and contains lower frequencies than the VHF band.
options.c: The VHF band is used for aeronautical mobile communications and contains higher frequencies than the UHF band.
options.d: The VHF band is used for aeronautical mobile communications and contains lower frequencies than the SHF band.
